full_text:
Fan You 樊友
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fan You (樊友). Governor of Yidu, fled his post to Lu Xun during Wu’s invasion of Jing. Fan You was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
